brief: Nudge trial users to invite teammates
subject: Bring one teammate in
body: Your first project is ready. Invite one teammate so the next campaign brief has the right people in the room. Get started from workspace settings.

subject: Your Monday report is ready
body: Weekly campaign summaries can now be generated automatically. Open the reporting tab and try it on your next campaign.

subject: A quick way back
body: Your workspace is still here. Reply with the campaign you want to move forward and we will point you to the fastest next step.
